data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario regarding waitlisting for sold-out group events.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior for waitlisting sold-out group events, but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this scenario. The linked use case discusses a booking transfer but does not mention waitlisting or how it would be handled in the system. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to confirm or deny the expected outcome of the scenario.
gaps: No evidence of waitlisting functionality or behavior for sold-out events.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for waitlisting functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the waitlisting behavior for sold-out group events.
